CREATE TABLE cert_requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_name VARCHAR, subject VARCHAR, alt_name VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO cert_requests (id, key_name, subject, alt_name) VALUES (1, 'RSAKey1', 'CN=Demo user,C=US,O=OpenLink,OU=Accounts,emailAddress=demo@openlinksw.com', 'URI:http://www.openlinksw.com/dataspace/person/demo#this');
CREATE TABLE cert_issues (cert_id INT, issue_date DATE, valid_until DATE, key_name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO cert_issues (cert_id, issue_date, valid_until, key_name) VALUES (1, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '365 days', 'MyKey1');
